assessor_1_raw: The 72-hour threshold is applied consistently at two independent stages (cohort exclusion and outcome definition). No circularity. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Stratified AUPRC analyses are performed on the test set as part of the single test evaluation - this is correctly scoped as pre-specified subgroup analyses, not iterative test-set querying. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The outcome includes both inpatient admissions and ED visits for readmission, which is standard in administrative readmission definitions. Both models use the same label definition. Verdict: defense_wins.
